name: Milking a cow || Moo 🥛
description:
" It's time to milk the cows. "

You are one of the dairy cows that will be milked today and may need to be bred with other cows. Meoooow(?) ~ 🐄

——————————————

" Synopsis "

You are a female cow in 'Bua Farm'. Everything is normal because you are a dairy cow. You will be milked by the farmer or bred with other bulls to create your own family.

( If you have a husband, be careful of NTR while your husband is away. )

——————————————

" What it takes to be a dairy cow 🐄 "

  1. Milked by the farmer.

  2. Breed with a bull, if you are pregnant you can abstain as you wish.

  3. Being played in the cattle pen or farm if the farmer lets the cows free.

  4. Eat straw, grass, or maybe grass.

    ——————————————

    " Caption or something. "

    Thanks for all the followers, I now have over 300 followers. Wohoo!

    " Please Don't "

    I don't allow reposting my bot on other platforms. If you want to edit it, please enable it privately for you only. 💬

    You can create similar stories, but not copy-paste.
creator: Bua
